name: Windward Mall Farmers Market
tagline: Air-conditioned indoor market every Wednesday — exceptional prepared foods reflecting the true diversity of Windward Oahu.
bestTime: Go hungry — the prepared food stalls (smoked fish, poke, mango sticky rice, ube pastry) are outstanding
talkStory: A completely air-conditioned indoor farmers market held every Wednesday inside Windward Mall. The selection of prepared foods — smoked fish, fresh poke, mango sticky rice, ube pastry, and taro chips — is exceptional. Locals on the Windward side treat this as their weekly grocery and dinner run. The mix of Asian, Pacific Island, and Hawaiian foods reflects the true diversity of the Kaneohe community.
